hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|css|json|md)$ ]]; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.env(\.local|\.example)?$ ]]; then echo 'BLOCKED: .env files contain real API keys and secrets. Edit these files manually in your editor.'; exit 2; fi
